styleGuidelines:
## Brand & Style

This design system embodies a premium, "Modern Noir" aesthetic tailored for the high-end grooming industry. It leverages a deep, cinematic atmosphere to evoke feelings of exclusivity, craftsmanship, and heritage. By pairing a dark, monochromatic foundation with metallic amber accents, the interface feels less like a tool and more like a luxury service experience.

The visual style is Minimalism with Tonal Layering. It avoids unnecessary ornamentation, allowing high-quality typography and selective color pops to guide the user's focus. The mood is serious, professional, and masculine, catering to a clientele that values precision and a curated environment.
